description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with distressed bold chest printFittingRegular Wash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry clean When you want to impress your date, get into this tee and spike up your hair.  Pair it with slim Fit denims and stylish canvas shoes for a great casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
